summary: Full backend (25/25 pytest) + frontend e2e tested for Team Task Manager. All critical flows pass: auth, RBAC, projects CRUD, tasks CRUD, kanban drag-and-drop via @dnd-kit, dashboard stats, members role mgmt, theme toggle. Only cosmetic/minor issues found.

ui_bugs.issue: Recharts emits 'width(-1) height(-1)' warnings on initial render (ResponsiveContainer parent has 0 width briefly). Charts do eventually render correctly. Consider adding minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer parent.

issues: Only the project title text inside the Card is a clickable <Link>; clicking the rest of the card body does not navigate. UX expectation is the entire card is clickable. Consider wrapping CardContent in a Link or onClick handler.

action_items: (Optional, LOW) Wrap entire project Card in a navigable Link or onClick handler so users can click anywhere on the card to open project detail.
(Optional, LOW) Suppress Recharts width/height warnings by enforcing min container sizing on dashboard chart cards.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend code is clean and well-structured (server.py 129 lines, all route files <140 lines).
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded/renamed to id in every serializer.
Bearer JWT auth with bcrypt is correctly implemented; seed_user updates password idempotently if changed.
RBAC enforced consistently: require_admin for projects/tasks writes and user role changes; tasks/status allows project members.
CORS uses allow_credentials=False with origins from env — fine for Bearer token auth (no cookies).
test_credentials: admin@demo.com / Admin@123 ; member@demo.com / Member@123 (seeded on startup, verified working)
seed_data_creation: Created one TEST_UI_Project via UI during testing (still in DB); one TEST_DragTask task. Cleanup not required but main agent may purge if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py is reusable (25 tests, ~7s). Demo admin/member tokens obtained via session-scoped fixtures. Kanban drag-and-drop tested via Playwright mouse.down/move(steps=20)/up against [data-testid=kanban-column-*] and [data-testid=task-card-*] selectors — confirmed PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status flows end-to-end.
